textByHash.a503d71ee5031e54ecb279b42b324a8037a1d454: Hello there traveller. Would you like some groceries? I have a large selection.
textByHash.2f941f6f6942cb9cf8552b69a4923324d47cbeaa: Hello there traveller. Would you like...
textByHash.8509880a95d9d0134ccfa43765ea6db2587dbdc6: Great Guthix! Where did you get those giant frogs' legs? They're enormous!
textByHash.68b92a49da2b751246e70ba0a11509195f7d95d5: Are you selling them? I'll give you 1000gp for all the frogs' legs you have!
textByHash.c95bd04662ca1b4437d986e4f3d063b048bd1c77: Oh well. Would you like to buy any groceries?
textByHash.5a0f78993217657fc6488d986d990ee57fda0b43: A pleasure doing business with you. Now do you need any groceries?
